questions.question: What metaphor does Paul use to describe Gentile believers being included with Israel?
options: A wild olive branch grafted into a cultivated olive tree
questions.answer: A wild olive branch grafted into a cultivated olive tree

questions.question: Has God rejected his people Israel, according to Paul?
Paul warns Gentile believers not to be arrogant toward the natural branches (Israel).
Oh the depth of the riches both of the _____ and knowledge of God!
For of him, and through him, and to him are all things. To him be the _____ forever!
